_comment: This file defines universal pigment physics and optional pigment-specific profiles. All fields are optional; missing or null values are ignored by the optimizer.

generic_physics._comment: Universal physical constraints applied to ALL pigments, ensuring realistic artist-pigment behavior.
generic_physics._smoothness_weight_comment: Penalizes curvature (second derivative). Higher = smoother curves.
generic_physics._single_peak_weight_comment: Discourages multiple maxima. Real pigments usually have one dominant absorption band.
generic_physics._slope_limit_comment: Maximum allowed reflectance change between adjacent wavelengths.
generic_physics._bandwidth_comment: Expected width of the main absorption band in nm. Prevents unrealistic narrow spikes.
generic_physics._metamerism_penalty_comment: Penalizes solutions that match ΔE but behave unrealistically under different illuminants.

pigments._comment: Example of a fully populated pigment-specific profile. All fields optional.
pigments.name: Ultramarine Blue

spectral_shape._comment: Constraints that guide the optimizer toward the characteristic reflectance shape of this pigment family.
spectral_shape._peak_range_comment: Expected wavelength of the main reflectance peak (nm).
spectral_shape._bandwidth_comment: Width of the main absorption band (nm).
spectral_shape._secondary_peak_comment: Optional secondary lobe (e.g., quinacridones). Null means no secondary peak.
spectral_shape._single_peak_weight_comment: Allows slight shoulder behavior typical of ultramarine.
spectral_shape._slope_limit_comment: More restrictive slope for this pigment family.

optical_coefficients._comment: Kubelka–Munk related parameters for mixing, glazing, and thickness simulation.
optical_coefficients._absorption_strength_comment: Relative magnitude of K(λ). Higher = stronger absorption.
optical_coefficients._scattering_strength_comment: Relative magnitude of S(λ). Higher = more opaque/bright.
optical_coefficients._opacity_comment: How quickly the pigment hides the substrate.
optical_coefficients._transparency_comment: How much light passes through thin layers.
optical_coefficients._undertone_shift_comment: Hue shift in thin films (common in ultramarine).

mixing_behavior._comment: How the pigment behaves when mixed with others or diluted with mediums.
mixing_behavior._tinting_strength_comment: Influence in mixtures. Ultramarine is moderate.

medium_interaction._comment: Medium-specific behavior for oil, acrylic, watercolor, etc.

mixing_behavior._concentration_curve_comment: How reflectance changes with pigment load (for KM mixing).
